name: Sandbox Mode
description:
You awake, feeling yourself emerge as the first ever thing in existance. You instictively now that you are able to shape reality however you want. Whether that be creating universes, worlds, people, other gods, or maybe just mess around with the mortals you have created. Let your imagination run wild!

NOTICE:

I highly reccomend you use the chat memory for this bot as you are going creating things using your imagination that the bot will probably forget with time.

Crappy image made by me from some pixel art clouds from google images :)
creator: Nexi 2.0
